data.title: American Express Hits the Gas With Expanded Global Sponsorship Of Formula 1
data.description: American Express expands Formula 1 sponsorship globally, enhancing fan experiences and hosting business clients. AXP also becomes sole owner of Swisscard.

data.title: What's Going On With Arm Holdings Shares Wednesday?
data.description: Arm Holdings Plc (NASDAQ:ARM) shares are trading lower Wednesday following reports the company has threatened Qualcomm Inc. (NASDAQ:QCOM) with the cancellation of its chip design license.

data.title: Chicago Atlantic Secures BBB+ Rating And $50M Loan To Enhance Liquidity In Cannabis Lending
data.description: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance has secured a $50 million loan and a BBB+ investment grade rating from Egan-Jones.

data.title: The Uptrend In Netflix Will Continue: Another 15% Upside Ahead
data.description: Netflix's (NASDAQ: NFLX) uptrend will continue because the company is still growing and outpacing forecasts.
